markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy for bottom-funnel competitor comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Competitor Content Strategy:** The plan for 120+ bottom-funnel articles is now segmented by competitor type (AI Roleplay vs. Human Coaching) to avoid confusing users.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Auto Dealership LP:** A new auto dealership landing page (LP) will launch as a sales-led tool. The existing blog post will be refreshed to align messaging and prevent SEO cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Primary Keyword Monitoring:** GrowthX will monitor primary "AI roleplay" keyword visibility to ensure the new competitor strategy doesn't degrade existing rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [**Content Categories:** New thought leadership articles will be integrated into existing user-facing categories, not a new "Thought Leadership" bucket.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)

## Topics

### Bottom-Funnel Competitor Content

  - [**Problem:** The initial plan for 120+ bottom-funnel articles mixed AI roleplay platforms (e.g., Hyperbound) with human coaching marketplaces (e.g., Torch).](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This mix is confusing for users and misrepresents market segments. Exec is a unique competitor in both spaces.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Solution:** Segment the content strategy into two distinct phases:](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Priority): AI Roleplay Platforms**](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
          - [Compare Exec vs. priority platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
          - [Compare priority platforms against each other.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Follow-up): Human Coaching Marketplaces**](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
          - [Compare platforms like BetterUp, Torch, CoachHub, and GrowthSpace against each other.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [**Implementation:** GrowthX will send a filtered list of topics for Exec approval before production begins.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)

### Auto Dealership Landing Page (LP)

  - [**New Initiative:** Exec is launching a new LP for auto dealerships, featuring 40 pre-built scenarios.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Purpose:** A mid-funnel sales tool for outreach, not an SEO play.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [**Potential Conflict:** The new LP could cannibalize traffic from the existing, high-ranking blog post, "AI role plays for car dealerships."](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
    1.  [**Refresh:** Update the blog post to align messaging with the new LP.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
    2.  [**CTA:** Update the blog post's CTA to link directly to the new LP.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
    3.  [**Monitor:** Track performance of both pages post-launch.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
    4.  [**Consider Merge:** If the LP outperforms the blog post for leads, merge the blog post into the LP via a 301 redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

### Content Operations & SEO

  - [**Publishing:** 18 articles from the content audit are now live; 10 more are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Redirects:** The 12 redirects identified in the audit are pending completion by Exec to improve site structure.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [**Thought Leadership:** New articles will be integrated into existing user-facing categories, not a new "Thought Leadership" category.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Existing categories are more useful for user navigation.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
      - [**Distribution:** Repurpose for other channels (newsletter, LinkedIn) as they are not SEO-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [Send filtered list of AI roleplay comparison topics for Exec approval.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [Monitor primary "AI roleplay" keyword visibility to protect rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [Refresh the "AI role plays for car dealerships" blog post post-LP launch.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [Update the blog post's CTA to link to the new auto dealership LP.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [**Exec:**](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
      - [Complete the 12 pending redirects identified in the content audit.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
      - [Notify GrowthX when the auto dealership LP is live.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
      - [Review and provide feedback on existing content categories for thought leadership integration.](https://fathom.video/share/pfaxhsEzbsjS87XPHzUK6SeyXkWzsjCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
